arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Espanyol, 2024 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Espanyol in what should be a manageable home game for Los Blancos, who earned a solid 3-1 win against Stuttgart last Tuesday. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Carvajal, Militao, Rudiger, Mendy, Tchouameni, Valverde, Bellingham, Vinicius, Rodrygo, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Transfer Talk: Real Madrid eye Liverpool star Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Real Madrid still retain their interest in Liverpool star Trent Alexander-Arnold, whose contract expires in the summer. Transfer Talk has the latest.

arts.ttl: Insider gives update on Real Madrid interest in Liverpool star Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Signing Trent Alexander-Arnold on a free transfer remains an opportunity ‘too good to miss’ for Real Madrid, according to La Liga insider Matteo Moretto. The England international has been heavily linked with Los Blancos in recent months. With his contract expiring at the end of this season, that talk has not died down.
